docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-06-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER JAMES AMERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING TO JUN-13-2018 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILE AN AMENDED APPLICATION NO LATER THAN NOON ON 6/8/18 WITH A COURTESY COPY DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
